What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

International Board Certified Lactation Consultant (IBCLC), in-home lactation support / virtual support, Luxe / Rescue / Duo package — in-home visits over weeks, 24/7 private messaging support between visits anytime you need support

Today ops snapshot Consult + visit board Parent record Intake + package view Feeding cadence + weight check view Follow-up + class enrollment view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every parent — Luxe, Rescue, Duo, single in-home, or virtual — gets one record with intake answers, package cadence, and between-visit text thread in one place.
  • Insurance path is tracked per parent (Aetna / UHC direct, Cigna portal check, or superbill reimbursement) so paperwork stops slipping between text and email.
  • Multi-visit cadence (3 months of Luxe, 5 weeks of Rescue, Duo follow-up week) is queued on one timeline instead of reconstructed from the /book/ inbox each morning.
